title: Now Hiring Store Manager at GAP India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at GAP India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with GAP India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About GAP India:
GAP India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
